steps.title: Supply the relative pronoun
steps.content: The phrase after the blank says the National Council of American Indians advocated for Native American civil rights. The sentence needs a relative pronoun to introduce that clause and give advocated a subject.

steps.title: Reject fragments and run-ons
steps.content: A creates a fragment, B leaves the verb phrase without a subject, and C creates an ungrammatical run-on. The sentence needs a comma and a relative pronoun to attach the clause to the council. The answer is D.
